mapper.update:
UPDATE xeus.crms_trans_rqst
reqst_id = #{reqstId},
reqst_resn = #{reqstResn},
reqst_detail = #{reqstDetail},
crime_typ = #{crimeTyp},
doc_no = #{docNo},
doc_file_nm = #{docFileNm},
doc_file_path = #{docFilePath},
req_gbn_cd = #{reqGbnCd},
WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric

UPDATE xeus.crms_trans_rqst
proc_stat_cd = #{procStatCd},
acpt_user_id = #{acptUserId},
acpt_dat = #{acptDat},
rejt_typ = #{rejtTyp},
rejt_resn = #{rejtResn},
WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
UPDATE xeus.crms_trans_rqst SET doc_no = #{docNo} WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
UPDATE xeus.crms_trans_rqst SET reqst_detail = #{reqstDetail} WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
UPDATE xeus.crms_trans_rqst SET doc_chng_yn = #{docChngYn} WHERE mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}::numeric
mapper.select:
SELECT proc_stat_cd, COUNT(*)::text AS cnt FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS rqst
rqst.reqst_id = '${reqstId}'
GROUP BY rqst.proc_stat_cd

SELECT (CASE WHEN char_length(rqst.use_rs_cd) > 0 THEN rqst.use_rs_cd ELSE 'NON' END) AS use_rs_cd , COUNT(*)::text AS cnt FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS rqst
rqst.proc_stat_cd = 'SK'
AND rqst.reqst_id = '${reqstId}'
GROUP BY rqst.use_rs_cd

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst
AND reqst_dat LIKE #{year}||'%'

SELECT a.ym AS reqst_dat, count(b.*) AS cnt
FROM (select substring(replace(generate_series('${year}-01-01'::timestamp, '${year}-12-01', '1 month')::varchar, '-', ''), 1, 6) AS ym) AS a LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS b ON a.ym = substring(b.reqst_dat, 1, 6)
GROUP BY a.ym ORDER BY a.ym

SELECT rqst_sw.rqst_count_sw AS rqst_cnt_sw , rqst_sn.rqst_count_sn AS rqst_cnt_sn , rqst_rs.rqst_count_rs AS rqst_cnt_rs , renew_ext.renew_count_ext AS renew_cnt_ext , renew_evi.renew_count_evi AS renew_cnt_evi , notip.user_id_result AS usr_id_rst , use.user_count AS usr_cnt , use_lock.lock_user AS lock_usr
FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS rqst_count_sw FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst WHERE proc_stat_cd = 'SW' AND req_gbn_cd <> '15') AS rqst_sw, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS rqst_count_sn FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst WHERE proc_stat_cd = 'SN' AND req_gbn_cd <> '15') AS rqst_sn, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS rqst_count_rs FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst WHERE proc_stat_cd = 'SK' AND req_gbn_cd <> '15' AND use_rs_cd = '11') AS rqst_rs, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS renew_count_ext FROM xeus.crms_rqst_renew AS renew LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS rqst ON rqst.mgr_seq = renew.rqst_mgr_seq AND rqst.req_gbn_cd <> '15' WHERE renew.renew_typ ='11' AND (renew.acpt_yn= '' OR renew.acpt_yn IS NULL)) AS renew_ext, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS renew_count_evi FROM xeus.crms_rqst_renew AS renew LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS rqst ON rqst.mgr_seq = renew.rqst_mgr_seq AND rqst.req_gbn_cd <> '15' WHERE renew.renew_typ ='12' AND (renew.acpt_yn= '' OR renew.acpt_yn IS NULL)) AS renew_evi LEFT JOIN (SELECT ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG( COALESCE(user_id, '') ), ',') AS user_id_result FROM xeus.mt_usr_desc WHERE auth_stat_cd = '12') AS notip ON 1=1, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM xeus.mt_usr_desc WHERE auth_stat_cd = '11' ) AS use, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS lock_user FROM xeus.mt_usr_desc WHERE auth_stat_cd = '14' ) AS use_lock

SELECT tot.cnt AS tot_cnt, sw.cnt AS sw_cnt, non.cnt AS non_cnt FROM (SELECT COUNT(mgr_seq) AS cnt FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst
AND reqst_id = '${reqstId}'
) AS tot,
(SELECT COUNT(mgr_seq) AS cnt FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst
proc_stat_cd = 'SW'
AND reqst_id = '${reqstId}'
) AS sw,
(SELECT COUNT(mgr_seq) AS cnt FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst
proc_stat_cd = 'SK' AND use_rs_cd = '11'
AND reqst_id = '${reqstId}'
) AS non

SELECT distinct rqst.reqst_id, usr.user_nm, count(*) as use_rs_cnt, max(rqst.reqst_dat) as reqst_dat FROM xeus.crms_trans_rqst rqst INNER JOIN xeus.mt_usr_desc usr on usr.user_id = rqst.reqst_id WHERE (rqst.use_rs_cd is null or rqst.use_rs_cd = '') and rqst.proc_stat_cd = 'SK' GROUP BY rqst.reqst_id, usr.user_nm
